TaskDescription: Dual-task protocol combining a guided visual search and a binaurally presented auditory N-back. The visual search asked participants to follow a red annulus around the screen and press a button if it stopped at a prespecified target. The auditory task was an N-back matching task on numbers presented at ~2 s intervals; the protocol had a baseline (visual + ignored audio) followed by three dual-task conditions at N=0, N=1, and N=2.
